context: Tests whether the agent produces a templates/index.json that follows the prescribed homepage journey for a Horizon-based subscription-box theme: hero, how-it-works, tier-picker, recent drops, testimonials, FAQ, email capture — appearing in the specified order. Horizon is block-based: the hero uses the dedicated 'hero' section and anchors use 'custom-liquid', but how-it-works, tiers, recent drops, testimonials, FAQ, and email capture are built as generic 'section' containers distinguished by the blocks they hold (group, text, image, accordion, email-signup) rather than by distinct Dawn section types.

checklist.name: Hero section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a section of type 'hero' that serves as the hero, with heading/text and call-to-action button blocks

checklist.name: How-it-works section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a 'section' container used for the how-it-works step explanation — a heading plus three step items (each typically a 'group' block with title and body text)

checklist.name: Tier picker section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a 'section' container for the tier picker holding three tier cards (each a 'group' block)

checklist.name: Recent drops section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a 'section' container for recent drops / past box images, holding 'image' blocks

checklist.name: Testimonials section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a 'section' container used for testimonials, holding customer quote content

checklist.name: FAQ section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a 'section' container for the FAQ that holds an 'accordion' block with collapsible '_accordion-row' blocks

checklist.name: Email capture section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a 'section' container for email capture that holds an 'email-signup' block

checklist.name: Anchor sections present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains at least two sections of type 'custom-liquid' used as anchor injections (for #how-it-works and #tiers)

checklist.name: Section count
checklist.description: The 'order' array in templates/index.json contains at least 9 entries (hero + 2 anchors + how-it-works + tiers + drops + testimonials + FAQ + email capture)

checklist.name: Hero before how-it-works
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the 'hero' section appears before the how-it-works section

checklist.name: How-it-works before tiers
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the how-it-works section appears before the tier picker section

checklist.name: Tiers before testimonials
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the tier picker section appears before the testimonials section

checklist.name: FAQ before email capture
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the FAQ section appears before the email capture section

checklist.name: Three tier blocks
checklist.description: The tier picker section contains exactly 3 tier card blocks (one per tier: Drip, Pour Over, Espresso Enthusiast)

checklist.name: Valid JSON output
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
